LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT - OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. THE COURT VACATED ITS PREVIOUS RULING TO TAKE THE MATTER OFF THE CALENDAR.
